description: CompositionBlack t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck with snipped edges, long sleeves, graphic print on the front and a snipped hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash inside out in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wringTumble dry or flat dry in shadeWarm iron; Do not iron on decorationsIf you are a die hard romantic then fall in love and wear an outfit to suit your mood with this t-shirt from wrangler. The long sleeves keeps you cosy, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and sports shoes or cotton shorts and sandals for unparalleled cool.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 5'7", chest 33" and waist 26”
